ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = frozenset({".jpg", ".png", ".gif", ".bmp", ".webp"})
ALLOWED_METHODS = frozenset({"GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"})


def filter_valid_files(filenames: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    valid_exts = frozenset({".jpg", ".png", ".gif"})
    return [name for name in filenames if any(name.endswith(ext) for ext in valid_exts)]


def validate_request_methods(requests: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    allowed = ALLOWED_METHODS
    return [req for req in requests if req["method"] in allowed]


def find_matching_users(users: list[dict], target_ids: list[int]) -> list[dict]:
    id_set = set(target_ids)
    return [user for user in users if user["id"] in id_set]


def process_batch(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    blocklist = frozenset({"spam", "junk", "trash", "garbage"})
    return [item.upper() for item in items if item not in blocklist]
